title: Auction System with Bidding Logic & Timers + Barter/Trade Offer System

requirements.text: Extend the backend actor to support an Auction data model with fields: auctionId, productId, sellerId, startingPrice, currentBid, highestBidderId, bidHistory (array of {bidderId, amount, timestamp}), startTime, endTime, status (active | ended | cancelled), and winner. Provide functions: createAuction, placeBid (validates bid > currentBid and auction is active and not expired), cancelAuction, getAuction, listActiveAuctions, listAuctionsByVendor, and finalizeAuction (closes auction, sets winner, triggers payout record). Enforce that only the auction creator (vendor) or an admin can cancel or finalize an auction.

quotes: Auction system with bidding logic and timers

acceptanceCriteria: createAuction stores a new auction with provided product, starting price, and duration
placeBid rejects bids lower than or equal to currentBid
placeBid rejects bids after endTime has passed
placeBid updates currentBid and highestBidderId and appends to bidHistory
finalizeAuction sets status to ended, records the winner, and creates a payout record for the vendor
listActiveAuctions returns only auctions with status=active and endTime in the future
Only auction creator or admin can call cancelAuction

requirements.text: Extend the backend actor to support a Barter/Trade Offer data model with fields: offerId, initiatorId, receiverId, offeredItems (array of {productId, quantity}), requestedItems (array of {productId, quantity}), optionalCashAdjustment (Int), status (pending | accepted | rejected | cancelled | completed), createdAt, and updatedAt. Provide functions: createTradeOffer, acceptTradeOffer, rejectTradeOffer, cancelTradeOffer, counterTradeOffer (creates a new offer referencing the original), getTradeOffer, listTradeOffersForUser (incoming and outgoing), and listAllTradeOffers (admin/moderator only). Accept and complete a trade by swapping product ownership/inventory. Moderators and admins can view all offers and cancel any offer.

quotes: Barter/trade offer system between users, moderators and Admins

acceptanceCriteria: createTradeOffer stores a new offer with initiator, receiver, offered items, and requested items
acceptTradeOffer updates status to accepted and triggers inventory transfer between parties
rejectTradeOffer updates status to rejected and notifies initiator
cancelTradeOffer is callable by initiator or admin/moderator
counterTradeOffer creates a new offer linked to the original with updated terms
listAllTradeOffers is restricted to admin and moderator roles
listTradeOffersForUser returns both incoming and outgoing offers for the calling user

requirements.text: Create an Auctions listing page at /auctions that displays all active auctions in a grid. Each auction card shows the product image, product name, current highest bid, starting price, number of bids, and a live countdown timer that decrements in real time to the auction end time. Clicking a card navigates to the auction detail page. Add an 'Auctions' link to the site header navigation.

quotes: Auction system with bidding logic and timers

acceptanceCriteria: Auctions page is accessible at /auctions
Each card shows current bid, time remaining (days/hours/minutes/seconds), and bid count
Countdown timer updates every second in real time
Auctions that have ended are visually marked as ended
Header navigation includes an 'Auctions' link
Page shows a loading skeleton while data is fetched

requirements.text: Create an Auction Detail page at /auctions/$auctionId showing full auction info: product details, current highest bid, bid history list (bidder principal truncated, amount, timestamp), and a live countdown timer. Authenticated users can submit a bid via an input field and 'Place Bid' button. Display real-time feedback on bid success or failure (e.g., bid too low, auction ended). Show the winner and final price when the auction has ended.

quotes: Auction system with bidding logic and timers

acceptanceCriteria: Route /auctions/$auctionId renders auction details
Bid input is disabled for unauthenticated users with a prompt to log in
Bid input is disabled and shows 'Auction Ended' when endTime has passed
Placing a bid below or equal to current bid shows an inline error
Successful bid updates the displayed current bid and bid history without full page reload
Ended auctions display winner principal and final bid amount
Countdown timer is visible and updates every second

requirements.text: Add auction management capabilities to the Vendor Dashboard. Vendors can create a new auction by selecting one of their products, setting a starting price, and specifying auction duration (hours). Display a list of the vendor's auctions (active, ended, cancelled) with current bid, end time, and an option to cancel active auctions.

quotes: Auction system with bidding logic and timers

acceptanceCriteria: Vendor Dashboard has an 'Auctions' section or tab
Create Auction form allows selecting a product, entering starting price, and setting duration
Vendor's auction list shows status, current bid, and countdown or end time
Cancel button is shown only for active auctions
Ended auctions display winner information

requirements.text: Add auction oversight to the Admin Dashboard. Admins can view all auctions (active, ended, cancelled) in a table with vendor, product, current bid, end time, and status. Admins can cancel any active auction. Admins can manually trigger finalization of an ended auction that has not yet been finalized.

quotes: Auction system with bidding logic and timers

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard includes an 'Auction Management' panel
Table lists all auctions with vendor, product, current bid, end time, status
Cancel action is available for active auctions
Finalize action is available for ended but unfinalized auctions
Actions reflect immediately in the table after completion

requirements.text: Create a Trade Offers page at /trade-offers for authenticated users. Display two tabs: 'Incoming Offers' (offers where the user is the receiver) and 'Outgoing Offers' (offers initiated by the user). Each offer card shows offered items, requested items, optional cash adjustment, status badge, and action buttons appropriate to role: receiver can Accept or Reject; initiator can Cancel; either party can Counter. Add a 'Trade Offers' link in the user profile dropdown menu or header navigation.

quotes: Barter/trade offer system between users, moderators and Admins

acceptanceCriteria: Route /trade-offers is accessible only to authenticated users
Incoming and Outgoing tabs each show relevant offers
Status badge uses color coding: pending (yellow), accepted (green), rejected (red), cancelled (gray), completed (teal)
Accept, Reject, Cancel, and Counter actions are contextually shown per role
Counter offer opens a form pre-filled with the original offer's items for editing
Empty states are shown when no offers exist in each tab

requirements.text: Create a 'New Trade Offer' flow accessible from the product listing or a user's profile. Allow the initiator to select one or more of their own products to offer, specify which products and quantities they want in return (by product ID or search), optionally enter a cash adjustment amount, and select the receiving user (by principal or username). Submit creates the trade offer and shows a confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: New Trade Offer form allows selecting offered products from the user's owned/purchased inventory
Requested items can be searched or entered by product ID
Optional cash adjustment field accepts positive or negative integers
Receiver selection accepts a valid principal ID
Form validates that at least one offered item and one requested item are present before submission
Submission success navigates to the Trade Offers page with a toast notification

requirements.text: Add a Trade Offer management panel to the Admin Dashboard. Admins and moderators can view all trade offers across all users in a sortable table showing offer ID, initiator, receiver, status, offered items count, requested items count, and creation date. Admins and moderators can cancel any pending offer.

quotes: Barter/trade offer system between users, moderators and Admins

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard includes a 'Trade Offer Management' panel
Table lists all trade offers with initiator, receiver, status, and timestamps
Cancel action is available for pending offers
Panel is visible to admin and moderator roles only
Table supports sorting by status and creation date

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks in useQueries.ts for all new auction and trade offer backend functions: useListActiveAuctions, useGetAuction, useListAuctionsByVendor, useListAllAuctions (admin), useCreateAuction, usePlaceBid, useCancelAuction, useFinalizeAuction, useListTradeOffersForUser, useListAllTradeOffers (admin/moderator), useCreateTradeOffer, useAcceptTradeOffer, useRejectTradeOffer, useCancelTradeOffer, and useCounterTradeOffer.
acceptanceCriteria: Each hook correctly calls the corresponding backend actor function
Query hooks use appropriate cache keys and invalidation on mutation success
Mutation hooks expose isLoading, isError, and error states
useListActiveAuctions refetches on a short interval (e.g., every 30 seconds) to keep countdown data fresh

constraints: All backend logic must remain in the single actor file backend/main.mo
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Auction timer countdown must be client-side only; backend stores endTime as a timestamp
Trade offer item transfers must validate that the initiator owns or has sufficient stock of offered items before accepting
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket-based bid updates (polling is acceptable)
Email or push notifications for auction wins or trade offer events
Escrow or on-chain payment processing for trade offers
Auction reserve prices or buy-it-now pricing in this iteration
Public user profile pages for browsing another user's inventory
